title: Monday.com Development tutorials
excerpt: I am looking for resources to learn how to build my own apps for Monday.  I need to build a few things that i can’t find in the app marketplace.

posts.author: JCouto (John Couto)
posts.cookedHtml: I am looking for resources to learn how to build my own apps for Monday. I need to build a few things that i can’t find in the app marketplace.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @JCouto,

Here you have some useful links for that:
API documentation: monday.com GraphQL API
Apps framework documentation: What is a monday app?
Workflow blocks webinar: Workflow Blocks webinar | monday.com - YouTube
Postman examples: Postman

These links should give you what you need to get started

Cheers,
Matias
